description_long: This object is a modern pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust and tactical design. The barrel is medium in length and has a vented heat shield running along its top, providing both protection and improved cooling. The fore-end is ribbed for enhanced grip and is clearly designed to be pumped back and forth to chamber rounds. The stock is a synthetic, full-length type with a straight comb and a pistol grip for better control. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer components, giving it a durable yet lightweight feel suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte black, pump-action shotgun with a vented barrel heat shield, ribbed fore-end, and synthetic full stock with pistol grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the vented barrel, ribbed pump fore-end, and full synthetic stock.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, barrel opening, and the ribbed fore-end directly beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, trigger guard, and pump.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock, the alignment of the barrel, and the pistol grip profile.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented heat shield along the top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
